title: Sort button on Workspaces

posts.author: Larryr20 (Larry Rabinowitz)
posts.cookedHtml: We have many workspaces that have a long list of boards. End users can move the boards, up, down and even into other folders and we cannot stop them. We are constantly reordering the boards manually. Can we (admins) either have a sort button so we can do it in one shot or restrict end users ability to move boards within a workspace?
